title: The Covenant of Abraham: Understanding Our Hebrew Roots
speaker: Rabbi Dr. Phillip Banda
description: In this powerful teaching, Rabbi Dr. Phillip Banda takes us deep into the Abrahamic covenant and what it means for us as a Hebrew community today. We explore the original Hebrew text and uncover truths that have been hidden from the modern church.

title: Shabbat: The Fourth Commandment and Its Significance
speaker: Rabbi Dr. Phillip Banda
description: Why does the fourth commandment matter? Rabbi Banda unpacks the biblical and Hebrew significance of Shabbat and why keeping it holy is still relevant for believers today.

title: Walking in Torah: Living the Hebrew Way in the Modern World
speaker: Rabbi Dr. Phillip Banda
description: How do we apply ancient Torah principles to our modern lives? This teaching bridges the gap between ancient Hebrew wisdom and contemporary living.

title: The Feasts of the LORD: Understanding the Biblical Moedim
speaker: Rabbi Dr. Phillip Banda
description: A comprehensive study of the seven feasts of the LORD as given in Leviticus 23, exploring their prophetic significance and how to observe them today.

title: Shema Yisrael: The Foundational Confession of the Hebrew Faith
speaker: Rabbi Dr. Phillip Banda
description: Exploring the Shema — Deuteronomy 6:4 — the cornerstone of Hebrew faith, its Hebrew meaning, and its profound implications for believers.

title: The Menorah: Hidden Mysteries of the Seven Lamps
speaker: Rabbi Dr. Phillip Banda
description: An in-depth exploration of the Menorah, its design, symbolism, and what the seven lamps represent in both the physical Tabernacle and our spiritual walk.
